content.summary: The UAE is a major trading hub and gateway to GCC and Middle East markets. Strong contract enforcement and excellent logistics infrastructure. Dubai acts as a re-export hub.
content.paymentPreference: L/C standard; T/T for trusted partners
bestPractices: Halal certification mandatory for food products (ESMA or IFRC approved)
ESMA conformity marking required for regulated products
UAE-Indonesia CEPA in effect — preferential tariffs apply
Products may be re-exported to Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait
